clarity.notes: Each page has one primary task and predictions are labeled as estimates.

hierarchy.notes: The dashboard prioritizes the prediction range, then logging and pattern context.

typography.notes: Fluid headings and compact supporting text remain readable across breakpoints.

motion.notes: Feedback is restrained and reduced-motion preferences are respected.

brand.notes: Blush and lavender distinguish logged data, predictions, and actions without weakening professionalism.
